item.title: create a simple hello.php that prints the current date

output:
✅ Approved

Single file (`hello.php`) added at project root. Scope matches PR title and issue #8 exactly — "create a simple hello.php that prints the current date." The implementation is a 3-line PHP script that echoes the current date in `Y-m-d H:i:s` format. No scope drift, no secrets, no leftover debug code, no unrelated changes.

**nit: hello.php** — A standalone PHP script at the root of a Laravel project is unconventional. For production use, consider an Artisan command (`php artisan make:command`) or a route instead. Fine for the stated purpose of this issue.

RUN_OK: approved PR #9 — trivial hello.php script, scope matches issue #8 exactly
